Jonas Harder: Fiorentina’s Rising Star from Goalkeeper to Midfield Maestro
arts.sum: Jonas Harder, a promising talent from Fiorentina's youth academy, may get his chance to shine in the first team as the Viola face an injury crisis ahead of their rescheduled match against Inter Milan. Born in Florence on September 30, 2005, Harder's journey to professional football is as unique as his name suggests. arts.ttl: Inter XI vs Fiorentina – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Inter Milan head to Fiorentina this evening as Simeone Inzaghi’s side continue their defence of the Scudetto. The rearranged fixture will commence from the 16th minute, after the initial fixture was postponed in December due to Edoardo Bove suffering a cardiac arrest. arts.ttl: Agent explains how Manchester City smashed Inter Milan aside to secure impressive signing
arts.sum: Manchester City signed Vitor Reis from Palmeiras in the January transfer window. The Citizens shelled out around £30m for the defender, who has been on the bench in the last two games for Pep Guardiola’s side. The highly rated 19-year-old’s agent Federico Pastorello has now spoken about how the transfer to Manchester City came about, The post Agent explains how Manchester City smashed Inter Milan aside to secure impressive signing appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Inter: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Inter Milan are gearing up for a crucial Serie A fixture against Fiorentina on Thursday evening. This match, originally scheduled for December 1, was halted after 16 minutes due to a medical emergency. The game will resume from the 17th minute at 20:45 CET at the Stadio Artemio Franchi, with the score still at 0-0. The post Serie A | Fiorentina v Inter: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.
